implementation_difficulty_reason: Requires a new flavor-diagonal CP-odd lepton dipole observable, lepton/KK loop matching, and likely SMEFT-to-low-energy running. Existing Delta F=2 utilities and the mu->e gamma NDA helper do not compute d_mu.

commands: rg -n 'muEDM|muon.?EDM|muon electric dipole' quarkConstraints qcd flavorConstraints neutrinos yukawa warpConfig solvers scanParams tests -g '!*.ipynb'
rg -n '(^|[^[:alnum:]_])d_mu([^[:alnum:]_]|$)|(^|[^[:alnum:]_])dmu([^[:alnum:]_]|$)' quarkConstraints qcd flavorConstraints neutrinos yukawa warpConfig solvers scanParams tests -g '!*.ipynb'
rg -n 'electric dipole|EDM' quarkConstraints qcd flavorConstraints neutrinos yukawa warpConfig solvers scanParams tests -g '!*.ipynb'

rg -n "epsilon_K|epsilon_k|Delta m_K|DELTA_M_K|evaluate_delta_mk|B_d|b_d|B_s|b_s|D0|d_mix|mu.?e.?gamma|muToEGamma|BR_LIMIT|MEG" quarkConstraints flavorConstraints scanParams neutrinos yukawa qcd scripts tests docs -g '!*.ipynb'

rg -n "b.?->.?s|X_s|K\\*|R_K|R_D|B_s.*mu|pi.*nu|nu.*nubar|epsilon.?prime|eps.?prime|t.?->|Z.?->|h.?->|EDM|dipole|conversion|tau.?->|mu.?->.?3e" quarkConstraints flavorConstraints scanParams neutrinos yukawa qcd scripts tests docs -g '!*.ipynb'

rg -n "MODERN_PHENOMENOLOGY_SYSTEM_IDS|DEFAULT_DELTA_F2_INPUTS|evaluate_bd_mixing|evaluate_bs_mixing|evaluate_d0_mixing|check_mu_to_e_gamma" quarkConstraints flavorConstraints scanParams tests docs -g '!*.ipynb'
findings: Focused greps for muEDM, muon EDM, muon electric dipole, d_mu, and dmu over the required implementation/test directories returned no relevant muon-EDM implementation.
A broader d_mu-like grep produced only false positives for hadronic scales such as m_d_mu_had_GeV, not the muon EDM observable.
A focused electric dipole/EDM grep over the required implementation/test directories returned no matches.

flavorConstraints/muToEGamma.py:3, flavorConstraints/muToEGamma.py:21, and flavorConstraints/muToEGamma.py:81 implement an off-diagonal mu->e gamma dipole constraint, not the flavor-diagonal muon EDM.
scanParams/scan.py:33 records a MEG II mu->e gamma branching-fraction bound, not a muon EDM constraint.

sections.process:
\textbf{Standard notation:} \(d_\mu\).  This entry covers the flavor-diagonal
CP-odd electric dipole moment of the muon, cataloged in the
\texttt{edm\_neutrino} family.  It is an EDM-adjacent lepton-sector process,
not a charged-lepton-flavor-violating decay and not a quark \(\Delta F=2\)
observable.
sections.pdg_prose:
The sidecar block \texttt{pdg\_or\_equivalent.canonical\_direct\_limit}, from
PDG Live 2026 (\texttt{PDG2026:MuonEDM}), lists the canonical direct
experimental bound as
\[
  |d_\mu| < 1.8\times10^{-19}\ e\,\mathrm{cm}
  \qquad (95\%~\mathrm{CL}),
\]
from the Bennett et al. BNL E821 storage-ring analysis; see
\texttt{flavor\_catalog/references/E002/pdg2026\_muon\_edm\_datablock.txt}.
The sidecar block \texttt{pdg\_or\_equivalent.pdg\_combined\_measurement}
records the combined result as
\((0.0\pm0.9)\times10^{-19}\ e\,\mathrm{cm}\).  The
\texttt{pdg\_or\_equivalent.primary\_bnl\_measurement} block, from
\texttt{Bennett:MuonEDM2009}, reports
\(d_\mu=-0.1(0.9)\times10^{-19}\ e\,\mathrm{cm}\) and quotes
\(|d_\mu|<1.9\times10^{-19}\ e\,\mathrm{cm}\) at \(95\%\) CL.
sections.relevance:
A nonzero \(d_\mu\) probes the imaginary part of the flavor-diagonal muon
dipole operator, schematically
\(\bar\mu\sigma_{\alpha\beta}\gamma_5\mu F^{\alpha\beta}\).  In warped
lepton extensions, anarchic charged-lepton and neutrino Yukawa structures can
generate such dipoles through loop matching involving KK leptons, Higgs
dynamics, or gauge-sector phases.  The process therefore diagnoses CP
alignment in the muon sector, complementary to \(\mu\to e\gamma\), but it does
not directly constrain the existing quark-only scan.
sections.post_2008:
Relative to the 2008 CFW warped-flavor reference point
(\texttt{CsakiFalkowskiWeiler:RSFlavor2008}), the key direct experimental
development is the BNL E821 publication in 2009.  That analysis used muon
\(g-2\) storage-ring spin-precession data and remains the basis of the PDG
direct limit.  The major post-2008 prospective change is the dedicated PSI
muEDM program.  The 2021 PSI letter of intent
\texttt{auxiliary\_values.psi\_frozen\_spin\_projection}
(\texttt{Adelmann:MuonEDMPSI2021}) proposes a frozen-spin search with
\(p=125~\mathrm{MeV}/c\), \(|B|=3~\mathrm{T}\), a rest-frame electric field
of \(1~\mathrm{GV/m}\), and an expected sensitivity
\(\sigma(d_\mu)\leq6\times10^{-23}\ e\,\mathrm{cm}\).  The
\texttt{auxiliary\_values.psi\_2024\_status} entry
(\texttt{Renga:MuonEDMStatus2024}) describes a first phase aimed at
demonstrating feasibility by 2026, with an ultimate goal of improving the
sensitivity by a factor of \(100\) by the early 2030s.
sections.validity:
The PDG number is a robust direct storage-ring bound on a static muon EDM.
Its interpretation in RS is model-dependent: a live constraint requires the
lepton-sector CP phases, the dipole matching scale, and the treatment of
SMEFT/low-energy running to be fixed.  The PSI entries are projections and
should be treated as roadmap information, not current exclusions.
sections.code_coverage_prose:
\textbf{NO.}  Focused greps for \texttt{muEDM}, \texttt{muon.?EDM},
\texttt{muon electric dipole}, \texttt{d\_mu}, and \texttt{dmu} over
\texttt{quarkConstraints/}, \texttt{qcd/}, \texttt{flavorConstraints/},
\texttt{neutrinos/}, \texttt{yukawa/}, \texttt{warpConfig/},
\texttt{solvers/}, \texttt{scanParams/}, and \texttt{tests/} found no muon-EDM
implementation.  The nearby dipole code is the off-diagonal
\(\mu\to e\gamma\) helper in \texttt{flavorConstraints/muToEGamma.py:3},
\texttt{:21}, and \texttt{:81}, with the MEG II branching-fraction default at
\texttt{scanParams/scan.py:33}; that is a different observable.
sections.implementation_difficulty_prose:
\textbf{HIGH.}  A production implementation needs a new flavor-diagonal
CP-odd lepton dipole observable, loop matching from the lepton/KK sector, and
likely SMEFT-to-low-energy running.  The existing \(\Delta F=2\) basis and the
\(\mu\to e\gamma\) NDA helper do not calculate \(d_\mu\).
sections.key_references:
Process-local source keys before bibliography consolidation:
\texttt{PDG2026:MuonEDM}, \texttt{Bennett:MuonEDM2009},
\texttt{Adelmann:MuonEDMPSI2021}, \texttt{Renga:MuonEDMStatus2024}, and
\texttt{CsakiFalkowskiWeiler:RSFlavor2008}.
